name: Cheese and Potato Wild Rice Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10 3/4 oz.) cream of potato soup
recipeInstructions:
(Dilute with 1 can liquid: 1/2 milk; 1/2 water).
1. Combine wild rice and water in a saucepan. Cook over low heat for 45 minutes.
2. Drain the cooked rice and set aside.
3. Fry bacon pieces and onion in a skillet until the bacon is crisp.
4. Drain the bacon and onion on paper towels.
5. Place the soup in a large saucepan. Dilute as directed above.
6. Stir in milk (1 quart), bacon, onion, cheese, and cooked rice.
7. Stir until the cheese is melted.
8. Garnish with carrot curls if desired.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings.
